title: Spectrum Essentials
description: The recommended mods to use with Spectrum.
body:
The mods in this pack are meant to compliment and allow spectrum to shine without other content mods overshadowing or fighting for your attention.

Use if you want to play the [Spectrum mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum) mostly standalone.

Some featured mods are:
- Hex Casting  
- Excorrelation
- Wormhole
- Tectonic
- Immersive Portals


 @Oakelope#7604 in the spectrum discord for feedback
